_schema.purpose: Manual overrides for campaign-level data that can't be derived. Add entries by campaign ID.

fields.delivered: 'yes' | 'no' | null — did the campaign actually ship what it promised? null defaults to inheriting project status.
fields.projectSlug: string | null — manually link this campaign to a project when text matchers can't find it. Overrides the resolver.
fields.note: string — short reason. Shows up in tooltips.

abc12345-def6.note: title doesn't mention Selene but the recipient address matches

ac566c75e59abc74.note: mainnet.cash is the same project as mainnet-js

52fb481bc473d44d.note: Satoshi's Angels Flipstarter Year 2022 — text matcher missed it

84eed4e438825033.note: Satoshi's Angels Flipstarter Campaign — text matcher missed it

fc353ccb0c26a44f.note: Smart Bitcoin Cash — same project as SmartBCH (EVM sidechain). Delivered but the network later went dormant.

8fa3a68c041d0cbb.note: 2022 International BCH Marketing & Content — funded but did not deliver

7ae8d215a9c0857b.note: 500k YouTube Channel BCH Series — funded but did not deliver

50263de63f29d465.note: Breaking Bitcoin — funded 299.5 BCH but did not deliver
